items.title: Kerala HC extends stay on coercive action against former DGP
items.summary: Ms. Sreelekha had allegedly divulged details that could identify minor rape survivors from the Kiliroor and Kaviyoor sexual assault cases through her YouTube Channel
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Israeli air strike in Gaza City kills family of six, medics say
items.summary: Firas al-Masri, his wife and their four children died in the attack, which the Israeli military says targeted a Hamas operative.
